title: salacia chlorantha subsp. dalzielii
intro: Salacia chlorantha subsp. dalzielii, also known as bitter calabash or African bitter calabash, is a plant species in the Celastraceae family, native to West Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the activity of digestive enzymes and lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Salacia chlorantha subsp. dalzielii include its potential to aid in weight management, improve glucose tolerance, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically used to make teas, extracts, and tablets, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
